visa_types.name: Work
visa_types.visa_fees:
[tur > npl > en > Table:Work > Visa Fees 1]
** A consolidated demand draft in favour of "Türkiye Embassy Consular Account Number 409000401176" payable in New Delhi, India to be submitted towards the Visa and Additional Türkiye Visa Applications Service Fee.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants prepare their visa fees demand draft with an additional NPR 1375/-

[tur > npl > en > Table:Work > Visa Fees 2]
The mode of the payment for Türkiye Visa Applications Service Fees is through cash/QR only at the centre.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants residing in Nepal are permitted to submit their Work visa applications up to 60 days prior to their intended date of travel.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants residing in Nepal are permitted to submit their Work visa applications up to 60 days prior to their intended date of travel.

## Visa Fees

[tur > npl > en > Table:Work > Visa Fees 1]
** A consolidated demand draft in favour of "Türkiye Embassy Consular Account Number 409000401176" payable in New Delhi, India to be submitted towards the Visa and Additional Türkiye Visa Applications Service Fee.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants prepare their visa fees demand draft with an additional NPR 1375/-

[tur > npl > en > Table:Work > Visa Fees 2]
The mode of the payment for Türkiye Visa Applications Service Fees is through cash/QR only at the centre.

## Documents Required
Click here  to download checklist

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 2.5 inch * 2.5 inch covering 80% face with White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.

## Application Form
Click here  to download
